title: Rīga City Council scuffle to be reviewed
summary_full: During a meeting of the Rīga City Council Property Committee on Tuesday, council members lost their tempers and began shoving one another. The City Council’s Ethics Commission has promised to review these events, while Rīga Deputy Mayor Edvards Ratnieks (National Alliance) is calling for a ban on personal filming at the meetings, Latvian Radio reports on 13th May.
